checks.description: After reset deassertion, observable outputs must settle to a defined non-X state before any functional observation.
checks.pass_condition: EMPTY and FULL are stable (no X or Z) and dataOut is stable for at least one clock cycle after reset release.
checks.trigger_condition: When Rst transitions from high to low.

checks.description: Write a value then read it back; dataOut must equal the written value and EMPTY/FULL flags must reflect buffer state.
checks.pass_condition: After the write (RW=0) with EN=1, EMPTY becomes 0 and FULL remains 0 (since depth 4). After subsequent read (RW=1) with EN=1, dataOut equals the previously written dataIn (2) and EMPTY becomes 1.
checks.trigger_condition: When the stimulus program for basic_001 completes.

checks.description: Boundary values on dataIn and EN must not cause illegal state transitions.
checks.pass_condition: For dataIn=0 and dataIn=15 with EN=1, the buffer respects full/empty flags and never drives X on outputs.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge stimulus patterns are applied.

checks.description: Two consecutive write operations must be reflected in buffer depth and flags without collapsing into a single observable change.
checks.pass_condition: After first write, EMPTY=0 and FULL=0; after second write, FULL remains 0 (capacity 4) and EMPTY=0. No X on flags.
checks.trigger_condition: When two back-to-back write stimuli are issued.

unresolved_items: Spec/reset hint could not be mapped to a known reset port: If the reset signal is low, the buffer checks if it is full or empty and processes data accordingly:
